scenario.name: MESSAGE (auto-100 Trying)
scenario.send:
MESSAGE sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:sender@[local_ip]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: <sip:[service]@[remote_ip]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 MESSAGE Contact: <sip:sender@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Max-Forwards: 70 User-Agent: SIPp/siphon-test Content-Type: text/plain Content-Length: [len]
auto-100 trying smoke test
